mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Address ( user_id, state_id, city, country, lane_one, pin, is_default ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{stateId}, #{city}, #{country}, #{addressLine1}, #{zipCode}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.select: SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, state_id AS stateId, city, country, lane_one AS addressLine1, pin AS zipCode, is_default AS isDefault FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET city = #{city}, country = #{country}, lane_one = #{addressLine1}, pin = #{zipCode}, state_id = #{stateId} where user_id = #{userId}
